title: So I found a weird cross between Adam and the Angel in ep08
display_title: So I found a weird cross between Adam and the Angel in ep08
wikitext:
[]: So I found a weird cross between Adam and the Angel in ep08             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Mon Apr 16, 2012 12:57 am This isn't really Eva-related, but just look at this thing: [url]http://mysteriousuniverse.org/wp-content/uploads/2011/08/ningen_float.jpg[/url] [url]http://forgetomori.com/wp-content/uploads/2007/11/ningenal.jpg[/url] [url]http://mysteriousuniverse.org/wp-content/uploads/2011/08/ningen_photo.jpg[/url] [url]http://pinktentacle.com/images/10/antarctic_humanoid_5.jpg[/url] Does this not scream "Angel" at you guys? Apparently it's a "humanoid fish" that people decided to call "Ningen" because it, well, looks like a human. Just 60 feet long, underwater, and really freaky looking. And who knows if it's real...

[]:             Quote Post by ONIAgent150 » Mon Apr 16, 2012 1:15 am Ohgodiwasabouttogotosleepwhydidyoupostthathellspawn.

[]:             Quote Post by Drabant » Mon Apr 16, 2012 1:18 am jesus christ how horrifying I don't think it's real.

[]: Re: So I found a weird cross between Adam and the Angel in e             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Mon Apr 16, 2012 2:24 am LeoXiao wrote: And who knows if it's real...

[]: Re: So I found a weird cross between Adam and the Angel in e             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Mon Apr 16, 2012 11:55 am Ironfoot wrote: Doubtful. All of those images are either photoshopped or artistic renditions. More than likely disinformation.

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Mon Apr 16, 2012 6:04 pm It's a Cryptid , which is something of an urban legend monster. Examples include Big Foot, the Loch Ness Monster, and the Slender Man. So you don't need to worry about this thing existing... At least not until we glimpse upon what horrorterrors lie in the darkest depths of the ocean, to which we will likely discover something worse . Neat find, by the way.

[]:             Quote Post by Kane of Nod » Mon Apr 16, 2012 6:50 pm It's probably fake, but boy does it look badass!

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Mon Apr 16, 2012 6:54 pm Slenderman isn't a cryptid, though. He was invented by a horror writer. Cryptids have had reported sightings and evidence of their existence, but could easily be hoaxes, delusion, or known animals that have been mistaken for for something else. The kongamato (a bird that appears in south-central African folklore; natives who are shown drawings of pterosaurs claim them to be the kongamato) and gray aliens are perhaps better examples than Slendy (as much as I love him).[/nitpick]

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Mon Apr 16, 2012 6:59 pm TehDonutKing wrote: Slenderman isn't a cryptid, though. He was invented by a horror writer.

[]:             Quote Post by sum_exsanguis » Wed May 02, 2012 7:46 pm well, if we all get tanged we had forewarning haha
